/usr/bin/cc -fPIC   -shared -Wl,-soname,libinterfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so -o libinterfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so CMakeFiles/interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/interfaces/msg/detail/error__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/interfaces/msg/detail/marker_status__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/interfaces/msg/detail/kpic1__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/interfaces/msg/detail/kpic2__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/interfaces/msg/detail/robot2_control__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/interfaces/msg/detail/robot2_status__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/interfaces/msg/detail/vision_control__functions.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/ros/foxy/lib: /opt/ros/foxy/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/foxy/lib/librcutils.so -ldl
